metadata.description: Autonomous dev-loop, cross-model review, and product/UX critique skills for Claude Code (with Codex companions).

plugins.name: skyhook-skills
plugins.description: Plan -> implement -> review -> PR -> converge autopilot, cross-model (Claude<->Codex) review, and a product/design/UX critique pass. Composable slash commands that scale ceremony to the task and never auto-accept a reviewer.
